positive: A stylized and detailed celestial bloom pattern, featuring interconnected line art of highly ornate cosmic flora and geometric mandalas. The main elements should include stylized crescent moons, shooting stars forming delicate vines, and deep-sea bioluminescent jellyfish arranged in a symmetrical, repeating radial pattern. The overall aesthetic is mystical and elegant, using a limited palette of rich indigo, gold foil metallic accents, and deep teal. The composition must be highly contrasted, designed as a central, isolated repeating print perfect for apparel, favoring clean silhouettes and linework against negative space. Mid-century modern illustration meets esoteric botanical etching. Vector illustration, high contrast, deep jewel tones, seamless repeat pattern.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low contrast, photorealism, messy, clutter, grunge, logo, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, out of focus
